barber-website-design.introParagraph: If you run a barbershop, your customers are already searching for you online before they even walk through your door. When someone types 'barber near me' or 'best barber in [your town]', the shops with a professional website are the ones that get chosen. A StaticSwift site lets you show off your signature cuts, list your prices upfront so clients know what to expect, and make it dead easy for people to find your location and opening hours. No more missed calls from people who could not find you. No more losing clients to the barbershop down the road that happens to have a website. At £149 once with no monthly fees, it pays for itself the moment a new client books in because they found you online.
barber-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Most barbershops rely entirely on walk-ins and word of mouth, which leaves serious money on the table from the growing majority of people who search online first. A professional website puts you on the map for every person in your area searching for a barber right now.
barber-website-design.faqQ1: Can I show my haircut styles and prices on the website?
barber-website-design.faqA1: Absolutely. We include a services and pricing section showing all your cuts with prices, and a gallery section where we can display photos of your work. Any photos you provide will be used — if you do not have any yet we style the gallery section ready for you to add them later.
barber-website-design.faqQ2: Can I add a booking link to my website?
barber-website-design.faqA2: Yes. If you use a booking system like Fresha, Booksy, or Square Appointments we add a prominent Book Now button that links directly to your booking page. If you prefer phone bookings we make your number the most prominent element on the site.

plumber-website-design.introParagraph: When a pipe bursts at midnight, people do not ask their neighbours for recommendations — they grab their phone and search Google. If your plumbing business does not have a website, you are invisible to every one of those emergency callouts in your area. A StaticSwift site makes you findable at exactly the moment customers are most ready to book. We include your service area, your contact number with a prominent click-to-call button, your key services, and trust signals like years of experience and qualifications. For a trade like plumbing, credibility matters. A professional website tells potential customers you are established and reliable before you have even spoken to them. At £149 once with no monthly fees, a single emergency callout covers the cost many times over.
plumber-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Plumbers who appear in Google search results when someone has an emergency get the call — those without websites simply do not exist to that customer. A website is the single most cost-effective way to generate consistent new enquiries for a local plumbing business.
plumber-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website show my Gas Safe or plumbing qualifications?
plumber-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and we actively recommend it. Professional qualifications like Gas Safe registration, CIPHE membership, or Trustmark accreditation are prominently displayed as trust badges on your site. They are one of the biggest conversion factors for new customers choosing between local tradespeople.
plumber-website-design.faqQ2: Can I list my service areas on the website?
plumber-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a service area section naming all the towns, cities, and postcodes you cover. This also helps with local SEO — Google is more likely to show your site to people searching in those specific areas.

electrician-website-design.introParagraph: Every day, homeowners and businesses in your area search Google for a local electrician. If your business does not have a professional website, every one of those searches sends a potential customer to a competitor. A StaticSwift website changes that. We build you a clean, professional site that immediately communicates your qualifications — NICEIC, NAPIT, or Part P registration — your service area, your range of work from consumer units to EV charger installation, and most importantly a prominent way to contact you. In the electrical trade, trust is everything. A professional website establishes that trust before the first phone call and makes the difference between a new customer choosing you or scrolling past to the next result.
electrician-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Qualified electricians without websites consistently lose work to less experienced competitors who simply show up in search results first. Being findable online is now as essential as having the right qualifications for growing a local electrical business.
electrician-website-design.faqQ1: Can you show my NICEIC or NAPIT registration on the website?
electrician-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and we always recommend including this prominently. Your accreditation badges are displayed in the header and trust section of your site. For customers choosing between electricians online, seeing a verifiable qualification badge is often the deciding factor.
electrician-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website cover all my services including EV chargers and smart home?
electrician-website-design.faqA2: Absolutely. We list all your services — rewires, consumer units, EV charger installation, smart home, landlord certificates, emergency callouts — with a brief description of each. This also helps Google understand what you offer and match you to relevant searches.

builder-website-design.introParagraph: Building and roofing work involves significant investment from homeowners, which means they research carefully before picking up the phone. A professional website is your chance to show the quality of your work, establish your credibility, and make it easy for potential customers to contact you. StaticSwift builds you a site that showcases your past projects, lists your services from extensions and loft conversions to flat roofing and repointing, and includes your qualifications and insurance details. We make sure your phone number is prominent and easy to tap on mobile. In a trade where referrals are gold, a professional website extends your reach far beyond the neighbours of your current customers, capturing the growing number of homeowners who start their search on Google.
builder-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Homeowners investing thousands in building or roofing work always research online before committing to a contractor. Without a website, you are excluded from consideration before the first conversation has even started.
builder-website-design.faqQ1: Can you include a gallery of my previous projects?
builder-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and a portfolio gallery is one of the most effective sections for builders and roofers. Send us your best before-and-after photos and we showcase them in a clean gallery. If you have got positive reviews from previous clients we can include those too.
builder-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website mention I am insured and fully qualified?
builder-website-design.faqA2: Yes, and we always recommend this. Your public liability insurance, any trade body memberships like the FMB or NFRC, and relevant qualifications are highlighted as trust signals. For high-value work, these details significantly increase the chance of an enquiry converting.

cleaning-company-website-design.introParagraph: Cleaning is one of the most searched-for local services in the UK. People moving into a new home, landlords between tenancies, and businesses needing regular office cleaning all search Google for local providers. If your cleaning business is not showing up, you are leaving a steady stream of easy enquiries on the table. A StaticSwift website lists your services clearly — regular domestic cleaning, end-of-tenancy, one-off deep cleans, commercial — with your pricing or a contact form for quotes. We include your coverage area, your credentials, and trust signals that make prospective clients confident choosing you. At £149 once, a professional website generates enquiries indefinitely. A single regular weekly clean booking covers the cost in a month.
cleaning-company-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: The cleaning industry runs on trust and first impressions, and for most potential clients that first impression is now a website. Cleaning businesses without a professional online presence are immediately passed over in favour of competitors who look more established.
cleaning-company-website-design.faqQ1: Can I list all my cleaning services and prices on the website?
cleaning-company-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We include a services section covering all your offerings — regular domestic, end-of-tenancy, deep clean, commercial, carpet cleaning — with pricing where you want it displayed or a contact form for bespoke quotes. You can always update us if your prices change.
cleaning-company-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website mention I am insured and DBS checked?
cleaning-company-website-design.faqA2: Absolutely, and these are some of the most important trust signals for a cleaning business. Insurance, DBS checks, and any accreditations are prominently displayed on the site. They are a significant factor in a customer choosing you over an unverified competitor.

photographer-website-design.introParagraph: For photographers, your website is your portfolio — and your portfolio is your business. Every couple searching for a wedding photographer, every family looking for a portrait session, every brand needing commercial photography is going to look at your website before they contact you. StaticSwift builds you a site that puts your images front and centre, with a gallery that loads fast and looks stunning on every device. We include your services, your style, your packages, and a contact form that makes it easy to enquire. No clunky page builders, no template that looks like ten other photographers in your city. A clean, fast, professional site that reflects the quality of your work and converts visitors into bookings.
photographer-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Photography is an entirely visual industry and clients make their decision based almost entirely on what they see online. A photographer without a professional website loses bookings to less talented competitors who simply present their work better.
photographer-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include a full photo gallery?
photographer-website-design.faqA1: Yes, gallery display is a priority for photographer sites. We build a fast-loading, responsive gallery showcasing your best work. For Starter sites this is a curated grid of your top images. Advanced sites include a full multi-section gallery organised by category — weddings, portraits, commercial, and so on.
photographer-website-design.faqQ2: Can I show my packages and pricing on the website?
photographer-website-design.faqA2: Yes. Many photographers prefer to list packages and starting prices — this filters out enquiries that are not a good fit and attracts clients who already know your rates. We display this however you prefer — full price list, starting from prices, or a contact form for bespoke quotes.

personal-trainer-website-design.introParagraph: People searching for a personal trainer are ready to commit — they just need to find the right one. If you do not have a professional website, you are invisible to every person in your area searching for a PT right now. A StaticSwift site showcases your specialisms, whether that is weight loss, strength training, sports performance, or post-natal fitness. We include your qualifications, your training style, testimonials from happy clients, and a clear way to book a consultation. Whether you are gym-based or offer mobile sessions, your website works as a 24-hour sales tool that explains who you are, what you offer, and why someone should choose you over the dozens of other trainers in your area. At £149 once, a single new client covers the cost immediately.
personal-trainer-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Personal training is a crowded market and potential clients research multiple trainers before committing. A professional website that clearly communicates your specialism, qualifications, and results is what makes the difference between getting the enquiry or not.
personal-trainer-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include client testimonials and transformation stories?
personal-trainer-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and for personal trainers these are enormously powerful. We include a testimonials section with written reviews and, if you have them, before-and-after results. These are the social proof that converts a browser into a serious enquiry.
personal-trainer-website-design.faqQ2: Can I show my Level 3 PT qualification and other certifications?
personal-trainer-website-design.faqA2: Absolutely. Your Level 3 personal training qualification and any specialist certifications — nutrition, sports massage, boxing, pre and post natal, and so on — are displayed prominently as trust badges. Clients look for these when choosing between trainers.

beauty-salon-website-design.introParagraph: Beauty treatments are a personal purchase and clients choose carefully. When someone searches for a lash technician, brow specialist, or beauty salon in your area, they are going to look at several options before booking. A professional website puts you in that consideration set and gives you the best possible first impression. StaticSwift builds you a site that displays your full treatment menu with prices, showcases your work with a gallery, and makes booking easy with a prominent contact button or link to your booking system. We design your site to match your brand — whether you want a clean minimal aesthetic or something warm and luxurious. A website that looks as good as the treatments you offer makes the difference between a browser becoming a loyal regular client.
beauty-salon-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Beauty clients research thoroughly before booking, especially for higher-value treatments like semi-permanent makeup or lash extensions. A professional website with clear pricing and a portfolio of your work is the difference between being on the shortlist or being overlooked.
beauty-salon-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website link to my Fresha or Treatwell booking page?
beauty-salon-website-design.faqA1: Yes. If you use any booking platform — Fresha, Treatwell, Square, Timely, or your own system — we add a prominent Book Now button that links directly to your booking page. We can also embed a contact form if you prefer enquiries by message.
beauty-salon-website-design.faqQ2: Can I list all my treatments and prices?
beauty-salon-website-design.faqA2: Yes, a full treatment menu with prices is standard on every beauty salon site we build. We organise your treatments into logical categories — lashes, brows, nails, facials, and so on — so clients can find what they are looking for instantly.

food-truck-website-design.introParagraph: Running a food truck or street food business means your customers need to find out where you are, when you will be there, and what you are serving. Without a website, every event and market location you attend is invisible to anyone who has not already seen you. A StaticSwift site gives you a permanent home online where you can display your menu, share your schedule of events and locations, take private booking enquiries for parties and corporate events, and build the following that turns occasional customers into regulars. We build your site to reflect the personality of your food — whether you are a sourdough pizza van, a Korean BBQ trailer, or a classic chippy on wheels. At £149 once with no monthly fees, your website works 24 hours a day to build your audience.
food-truck-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Food truck customers who discover you at an event want to follow your schedule and find you again — without a website they cannot, and you lose a potential regular. A professional site with an up-to-date events schedule turns one-time customers into a loyal following.
food-truck-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website show my upcoming events and locations?
food-truck-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We include an events and locations section where you can list your upcoming schedule — markets, festivals, regular pitches, and private bookings. We keep it simple so you can update it easily by emailing us, or we can set up a simple text-based format you maintain yourself.
food-truck-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website help me get private bookings for events?
food-truck-website-design.faqA2: Absolutely. Private hire for corporate events, weddings, birthdays, and festivals is often the most lucrative work for food trucks. We include a dedicated private bookings section with a contact form, your capacity and requirements, and what makes you a great fit for events.

cafe-website-design.introParagraph: Independent cafes and coffee shops are fighting for attention against national chains with huge marketing budgets. A professional website is one of the most powerful tools an independent has — it lets you tell your story, show your personality, and give potential customers a reason to choose you over the Costas and Greggs. StaticSwift builds you a site that shows off your food and drinks menu, highlights what makes you different, and makes it easy for people to find you and your opening hours. Whether you are a specialty coffee shop with single origin beans or a cosy neighbourhood cafe famous for your scones, your website communicates exactly what customers will get when they walk through the door. That is what turns a Google search into a first visit, and a first visit into a regular.
cafe-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Cafes that appear when someone searches 'coffee shop near me' or 'cafe [town name]' consistently outperform those that do not, even when the actual product is superior. A professional website with your menu and photos is what makes you discoverable to the customers who are already looking for you.
cafe-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website display my full food and drinks menu?
cafe-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We include a menu section showing your food and drinks with descriptions. If your menu changes regularly we can design it so the overall structure stays the same and you can email us simple updates — we make all changes free of charge as part of your ongoing free support.
cafe-website-design.faqQ2: Can I take table bookings or event reservations through the website?
cafe-website-design.faqA2: Yes. If you have a booking system we link to it prominently. If you prefer email or phone enquiries we include a contact form and make your contact details unmissable. For events and private hire we include a separate enquiry section.

dog-groomer-website-design.introParagraph: Dog owners are some of the most loyal customers in any service industry — once they find a groomer they trust, they book regularly for years. The challenge is getting that first booking. When a new dog owner moves to your area or a current owner is looking for a change, the first thing they do is search Google. A StaticSwift website puts your dog grooming business in front of exactly those people at exactly the right moment. We include your services and prices, the breeds and sizes you work with, your qualifications, and photos of your four-legged clients looking their best after a groom. A clear booking process and your contact details make it effortless for new clients to get in touch. One new regular client makes the £149 investment back in two or three visits.
dog-groomer-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Dog grooming is a repeat-booking business built on trust, and trust starts with a professional first impression. Groomers without websites are invisible to the wave of new dog owners in every area who are searching online for someone reliable to care for their pet.
dog-groomer-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website show the breeds and sizes I groom?
dog-groomer-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We include a section listing the breeds and sizes you work with, and any specialist services — hand stripping, breed-specific styling, puppy first grooms. This helps Google match your site to the specific searches dog owners make and reassures clients their breed is catered for.
dog-groomer-website-design.faqQ2: Can I show photos of dogs I have groomed?
dog-groomer-website-design.faqA2: Absolutely, and this is one of the most effective sections on a dog grooming site. Send us your best before-and-after grooming photos and we display them in a gallery. Happy, well-groomed dogs are the best possible advertisement for your business.

tattoo-studio-website-design.introParagraph: Tattoo clients do serious research before committing to a studio or artist. They are looking at portfolios, reading reviews, checking out the cleanliness and professionalism of the space, and assessing whether your style matches their vision. If you do not have a professional website, you are excluded from that research process entirely. A StaticSwift site gives you a space to showcase your portfolio, explain your process, list your artists and their specialisms, and make it easy to book a consultation. Whether your studio specialises in Japanese traditional, blackwork, fine line, or realism, your website communicates your identity and attracts the right clients. In an industry where reputation is everything, a professional online presence is non-negotiable.
tattoo-studio-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Tattoo clients spend significant money on permanent artwork and research extensively before choosing a studio. A professional website with a strong portfolio is how serious artists attract serious clients rather than relying purely on Instagram.
tattoo-studio-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website showcase each artist's individual portfolio?
tattoo-studio-website-design.faqA1: Yes. For multi-artist studios the Advanced site includes individual artist profiles with their portfolio gallery, specialisms, and booking details. For single-artist studios the Starter site includes a portfolio gallery and full artist profile. Your work is the centrepiece of the site.
tattoo-studio-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website explain my consultation and booking process?
tattoo-studio-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a clear booking process section explaining how consultations work, what clients should bring, deposit requirements, and turnaround times for custom designs. This sets expectations upfront and significantly reduces back-and-forth before the first consultation.

retail-website-design.introParagraph: Independent retailers face fierce competition from online giants and national chains, but local knowledge, personal service, and unique stock are advantages a website helps you communicate. StaticSwift builds you a site that showcases what makes your shop worth visiting — whether you are a specialist bookshop, a vintage clothing store, a local deli, or a gift shop with genuinely original stock. We include your product range, your story, your opening hours, and a clear reason why shopping with you beats ordering from a faceless website. Even if you do not sell online, a professional website drives footfall by making sure the people already looking for what you stock in your area can find you. In retail, visibility is revenue.
retail-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Independent retailers who do not appear in local search results lose customers to online retailers by default, even when those customers would prefer to shop locally. A professional website makes your shop discoverable to the people in your area who are actively looking for what you sell.
retail-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include a product catalogue or shop section?
retail-website-design.faqA1: Yes. Starter sites include a product showcase section highlighting key lines, new arrivals, or bestsellers with descriptions. Advanced sites include a fuller catalogue. For full e-commerce with basket and checkout, this requires a separate platform — we can advise on the best approach for your business.
retail-website-design.faqQ2: Can I promote in-store events and offers on the website?
retail-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a news or offers section that we can update for you free of charge whenever you have a sale, new stock, an event, or a promotion running. Email us the details and we update your site within 24 hours.

driving-instructor-website-design.introParagraph: Learner drivers and their parents search Google for local driving instructors before picking up the phone. If you do not have a professional website, you are invisible to every learner in your area right now. A StaticSwift site communicates your DVSA approval, your experience, your pass rate, and the areas you cover. We make your contact number and availability the most prominent elements so enquiries are effortless. Whether you specialise in nervous drivers, manual or automatic, or intensive courses, your website explains exactly what you offer and who you work best with. Driving lessons are booked in blocks of multiple sessions — a single new pupil found through your website represents hundreds of pounds in revenue and the cost of the site is recovered immediately.
driving-instructor-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: The majority of learner drivers and their parents now search online for local instructors rather than asking for referrals. A professional website with clear pricing, availability, and your DVSA approval is essential for generating a steady flow of new pupils.
driving-instructor-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website show my DVSA approval and pass rate?
driving-instructor-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and these are two of the most important trust signals for driving instructors. Your DVSA approved driving instructor badge and your pass rate are displayed prominently. If you have testimonials from past pupils who passed first time, we include those too.
driving-instructor-website-design.faqQ2: Can I list my prices and lesson packages on the website?
driving-instructor-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a clear pricing section showing your hourly rate, block booking discounts, intensive course packages, and any current offers. Transparent pricing reduces the number of enquiries you have to answer about rates and attracts pupils who are already committed at your price point.

accountant-website-design.introParagraph: Sole traders and small business owners search online for local accountants when they are ready to get their finances in order. If your accountancy practice does not have a professional website, you are missing out on a stream of warm, ready-to-engage enquiries every month. A StaticSwift site communicates your qualifications, your services from self-assessment returns to management accounts, the types of clients you work with, and your fees or a clear process for getting a quote. Professional credibility is the primary factor in choosing an accountant, and your website establishes that before the first conversation. Whether you are a sole practitioner or a small firm, a clean professional site significantly increases the number and quality of enquiries you receive.
accountant-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Accountants without a professional web presence are simply not considered by the growing number of business owners who research service providers online before making contact. A professional website is the most cost-effective new client generation tool available to a small practice.
accountant-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website list my qualifications and professional memberships?
accountant-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and for accountants these are critical trust signals. Your ACCA, ICAEW, AAT, or other professional qualifications and memberships are prominently displayed. Membership logos from professional bodies are included where available. These are often the deciding factor for prospective clients choosing between practices.
accountant-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website specify which types of clients I work with?
accountant-website-design.faqA2: Yes, and we recommend this. Whether you specialise in freelancers and contractors, hospitality businesses, property investors, or creative industries, your website communicates exactly who you serve best. This attracts the right clients and significantly improves the quality of your enquiries.

therapist-website-design.introParagraph: Choosing a therapist or counsellor is one of the most personal decisions a person makes. They are looking for someone they can trust, whose approach feels right, and who has the right qualifications and experience. Your website is often the first place a potential client encounters you, and it needs to communicate warmth, professionalism, and safety. StaticSwift builds therapy websites that balance clinical credibility with human approachability. We include your qualifications and BACP or UKCP registration, your therapeutic approach and specialisms, details about how sessions work, and a gentle, straightforward way to make an initial enquiry. A professional website helps the right clients find you and feel comfortable enough to take that first step and get in touch.
therapist-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: People seeking therapy research carefully and often review multiple therapists before making contact. Without a professional website, you are absent from that research process entirely, regardless of how skilled or experienced you are.
therapist-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include my BACP or UKCP accreditation?
therapist-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and for therapists this is one of the most important trust signals on the entire site. Your BACP, UKCP, COSCA, or other professional registration is prominently displayed. For clients who are researching carefully, seeing a verified professional membership significantly increases the likelihood they will make contact.
therapist-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website explain my therapeutic approach without using too much jargon?
therapist-website-design.faqA2: Yes, and this is something we focus on specifically for therapy websites. We describe your approach — whether that is person-centred, CBT, integrative, psychodynamic, or another modality — in plain, accessible language that connects with people who may not be familiar with therapeutic terminology.

dj-website-design.introParagraph: When couples start planning their wedding, finding the right DJ is high on the list — and that search starts online. Corporate event planners, party organisers, and venue coordinators all search for DJs online before making enquiries. If you do not have a professional website, you are invisible to all of them. A StaticSwift site showcases your style, your equipment, your experience, and the events you specialise in. We include your packages and pricing, testimonials from previous clients, a mix or showreel link, and a clear enquiry form with your availability calendar. Whether you specialise in weddings, club nights, corporate events, or school proms, your website communicates exactly who you are to the clients who are a perfect fit.
dj-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: DJ bookings, especially for weddings, involve significant spend and clients research thoroughly online before making shortlists. A professional website with packages, testimonials, and media samples is what gets you onto that shortlist in the first place.
dj-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include a mix or showreel video?
dj-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We can embed a YouTube or SoundCloud link prominently on your site so potential clients can hear your mixing style before they enquire. For wedding DJs especially, this is one of the most powerful conversion tools on the page.
dj-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website list my packages and prices?
dj-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a packages section with your standard packages, what is included in each (equipment, MCing, lighting, early setup, and so on) and your pricing or a starting-from price. Transparent pricing significantly reduces time wasted on enquiries from clients outside your budget range.

gardener-website-design.introParagraph: Gardening and landscaping services are searched for constantly — homeowners want their lawns maintained, their hedges cut, their patios laid, and their gardens transformed. When they search Google for a local gardener or landscaper, the businesses with professional websites are the ones that get enquiries. A StaticSwift site showcases your services from weekly lawn care to full garden redesigns, includes photos of your best work, and makes it simple for homeowners in your area to get in touch for a quote. Regular maintenance contracts are the backbone of a successful gardening business — your website generates the initial enquiry that turns into years of repeat work. At £149 once, a single new maintenance contract pays for the site in a matter of weeks.
gardener-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Homeowners searching for a gardener online are ready to book and have their card out — without a website you simply do not exist to them, regardless of how good your work is or how many years you have been trading in the area.
gardener-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website list all my services including one-off and regular maintenance?
gardener-website-design.faqA1: Yes. We include a full services section covering everything you offer — regular lawn care, hedge trimming, planting, clearances, hard landscaping, patio and decking, garden design. Separating your services clearly also helps Google match your site to the specific searches homeowners make.
gardener-website-design.faqQ2: Can I show photos of gardens I have worked on?
gardener-website-design.faqA2: Yes, and for gardeners and landscapers a portfolio gallery is one of the most effective parts of your site. Before-and-after photos are particularly powerful — they immediately demonstrate the transformation you deliver. Send us your best photos and we showcase them prominently.

childminder-website-design.introParagraph: Parents searching for childcare do not take risks — they research carefully, read reviews, check qualifications, and look at Ofsted ratings before making any enquiry. If your childminding business does not have a professional website, you are excluded from that research process entirely. A StaticSwift site communicates your Ofsted registration and inspection outcome, your approach to childcare, your opening hours and age groups, your rates, and what makes your setting a great environment for children to thrive. Parents who find you through your website already know your qualifications and approach before they call — these are warmer, more serious enquiries that are much more likely to lead to an actual placement.
childminder-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Parents searching for childcare overwhelmingly start online, and a childminder with a professional website demonstrating their Ofsted registration and ethos instantly outperforms unverified listings on Facebook groups or word of mouth alone.
childminder-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website show my Ofsted registration and latest inspection report?
childminder-website-design.faqA1: Yes, and for childminders this is the single most important trust signal on your website. Your Ofsted registration number and your most recent inspection outcome — Outstanding, Good, or Requires Improvement — are displayed prominently. Parents look for this immediately.
childminder-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website include my hourly rates and available spaces?
childminder-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include your rates clearly, your funded hours provision for two and three-year-olds if applicable, and a note on your current availability. If you have spaces we make that prominent — it significantly increases the number of enquiries you receive.

solicitor-website-design.introParagraph: When someone needs a solicitor, the stakes are high and the choice matters. They search Google, look at several options, and make a judgement about professionalism and credibility based largely on the quality of the websites they find. If your firm does not have a professional website, you are losing instructions to competitors who simply present themselves better online. A StaticSwift site communicates your areas of law, your team and their experience, your process, and a clear way to get in touch for a no-obligation initial conversation. Whether you specialise in residential conveyancing, family law, wills and probate, or immigration, your website establishes the professional credibility that makes potential clients confident picking up the phone.
solicitor-website-design.whyNeedsWebsite: Legal services involve significant personal and financial stakes, and clients research multiple firms before choosing. A professional website that clearly communicates your areas of law, team credentials, and process is essential for competing for instructions in your local market.
solicitor-website-design.faqQ1: Can the website include information about my SRA regulation?
solicitor-website-design.faqA1: Yes. Your Solicitors Regulation Authority registration details are included as a trust signal on your site. For potential clients unfamiliar with legal regulation, a visible SRA number and a brief explanation provide significant reassurance that you are a properly regulated firm.
solicitor-website-design.faqQ2: Can the website cover multiple areas of law?
solicitor-website-design.faqA2: Yes. We include a services section covering all your practice areas with a brief description of each. This also helps Google match your site to the specific legal searches people in your area make — whether that is 'conveyancing solicitor [town]' or 'divorce solicitor near me'.

london.localSentence: London's vast and competitive small business landscape makes standing out online essential — a professional website is how local traders capture their share of the city's enormous search volume.
